Name: LLM Embedding
Description: Generates embeddings for text input using an LLM provider. Dispatches to a Beacon with LLM capability.

SettingsInputs.Name: InputAddress
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to read text from

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to write embedding to

SettingsInputs.Name: AffinityKey
SettingsInputs.Description: Route to a specific Beacon worker

StateOutputs.Name: Dimensions
StateOutputs.Description: Number of dimensions in the embedding

StateOutputs.Name: BeaconID
StateOutputs.Description: ID of the Beacon that executed the work
